title: metrosideros × subtomentosa
intro: Metrosideros × subtomentosa, also known as the 'Red Leaved Pohutukawa', is a hybrid plant resulting from the cross-pollination of Metrosideros excelsa and M. robusta, native to New Zealand. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Metrosideros × subtomentosa include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and protect against infections. The herbal preparations of this plant, typically in the form of tinctures or infusions, are used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments, from skin irritations to respiratory issues.
